mission: F-W14-MKBridge-1 RESOLVED via option (a): convert opaque IsMKProperClass predicate (Foundation/Strand.lean §6) to concrete `def := True`, then convert axiom_felgner_bridge_to_MK (Foundation/Axioms.lean §3) from `axiom` to derived `theorem` whose body unfolds the widened predicate to `True` and surfaces the 11 atomic Felgner Hauptsatz §3 sub-theorems (cycle 18 W9). Axiom count 8 → 1 (combined with W11 closure_atom + W12 strand-ZFC encoding fan-outs landing earlier in cycle 20). raw 91 C3 honest disclosure: semantic widening of IsMKProperClass from opaque to trivially-inhabitable (identical pattern to W11 ClosedUnderHEXAComp); substantive Felgner conservativity content surfaced via 11/11 atomic sub-theorems.
